message:
Bump version to 1.4.0

Updated version across all package files:
- .claude-plugin/plugin.json: 1.3.0 → 1.4.0
- mcp/package.json: 1.3.0 → 1.4.0
- package.json: already 1.4.0

Reflects major session-based auto-capture enhancement with NPX support.
